monthlyPrice: base fee ¥0 plus paid toppings; confirm current topping prices
dataAmount: 0GB base, add data toppings by period or capacity
paymentRequirements: first paid topping required for some signup flows
pros: useful as a secondary line for people who manage data manually

users comfortable managing plans through an app
